report_name: SANS and SERC Partner to Bolster Grid Cybersecurity Training

identities.name: SANS Institute
identities.description: A global leader in cybersecurity training, partnering with SERC Reliability Corporation to provide advanced cybersecurity training for the U.S. electric utility sector, specifically the ICS456: NERC CIP course.

identities.name: SERC Reliability Corporation
identities.description: A regional entity responsible for ensuring the reliability of North America's bulk power system, partnering with the SANS Institute to deliver NERC CIP training to professionals in the U.S. electric utility sector.

identities.name: NERC
identities.description: The North American Electric Reliability Corporation, whose Critical Infrastructure Protection (CIP) compliance standards are the focus of the training initiative between SANS and SERC.

identities.name: GIAC
identities.description: Global Information Assurance Certification, the certifying body for the GIAC Critical Infrastructure Protection (GCIP) certification, for which the SANS ICS456 course prepares professionals.
